{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/4048696?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/mtolley", "id": 4048696, "login": "mtolley", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQwNDg2OTY=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtolley", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-25660", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
Authentication bypass occurs when the URL ends with Authentication with certain function calls. This bypass allows assigning arbitrary permissions to any existing user in CodeChecker.

### Details

The following functions are affected under the Authentication endpoint: `getAuthorisedNames`, `getPermissionsForUser`, `hasPermission`, `addPermission`, and `removePermission`.

The vulnerability allows unauthenticated users to execute these function calls with arbitrary arguments.
In the logs, the exploit shows as follows:
```
[INFO 2026-04-23 21:23] - 127.0.0.1:42654 -- [Anonymous] POST /v6.67/Authentication@getAuthorisedNames
[INFO 2026-04-23 21:23] - 127.0.0.1:42654 -- [Anonymous] POST /v6.67/Authentication@addPermission
```

### Impact
An attacker with a CodeChecker user can effectively acquire superuser permissions by calling these endpoints.

### Patch
A patch is available at https://github.com/Ericsson/codechecker/releases/tag/v6.27.4.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00447, "percentile": 0.35536}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T17:58:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-25660"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-24T14:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T17:58:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Ericsson/codechecker/security/advisories/GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-25660", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Ericsson/codechecker/security-advisories/GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Ericsson/codechecker", "summary": "Codechecker has an authentication bypass for certain API calls", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T17:58:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v9x-cqc5-j645", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "codechecker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.27.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Codechecker has an authentication bypass for certain API calls
